results.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 redesign leaked in high quality official press renders
results.description: One of the most well-known leakers came out of his retirement just to show us the partially adapted design of the Galaxy Watch Ultra successor in form of high-quality official render images. The ultimate Samsung smartwatch definitely adopts elements of the Galaxy Watch Classic8, some specs have also been confirmed.

results.title: Cerebras stock drops 10 percent as margins fall short of rivals
results.description: Cerebras posted its first earnings report post-IPO, and the market was not impressed. Shares fell 10 percent in after-hours trading after the AI chip designer forecast full-year gross margins well below those of its supposed rivals like Nvidia and AMD. Revenue, however, surpassed expectations by a clear margin. Cerebras raised 5.55 billion dollars in its [...]

results.title: Meta Tracked Keystrokes, Clicks And Screens: Did Its AI Training Project Cross The Line?
results.description: Meta is facing backlash after over 45,000 tables containing employee activity, their private conversations, performance data and transcriptions were accessible across the company
